name: Stir Fried Beef and Broccoli in Oyster Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the flank steak across the grain into very thin slices and place in a bowl.
2. Combine with soy sauce, rice wine, water, and cornstarch. Allow to marinate for at least 10 minutes.
3. Meanwhile, prepare the remaining ingredients.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet.
5. Add the meat and cook, stirring constantly, until it is about 75 percent cooked. Remove and set aside.
6. Scrape out any pan residue if necessary and return to heat.
7. Add another tablespoon of oil if needed and heat.
8. Add garlic, ginger, and green onions and cook for 30 to 60 seconds until fragrant.
9. Stir in the broccoli and add water. Cover and cook for 3 minutes.
10. Return the beef to the pan and combine well.
11. Add the sauce to the mixture and bring to a boil.
12. Cook until thickened and the beef and broccoli are cooked through.
13. Serve with steamed rice.
